capabilities.name: Survey builder
capabilities.verify: survey_templates + manage_survey_template skill (CRUD) + SurveysPage template editor; skip-logic supported via question.show_if honoured in PublicSurveyPage

capabilities.name: Multiple question types
capabilities.verify: PublicSurveyPage renders nps/csat + choice/single_choice/boolean/text/comment/number/rating; template editor supports score/text/choice
capabilities.notes: Custom question rendering now full-fat; skip-logic via show_if is respected.

capabilities.name: Public survey links
capabilities.verify: send_survey skill issues unique one-click token links; PublicSurveyPage renders them

capabilities.name: Scoring
capabilities.verify: survey_templates.pass_score + question.points/correct; submit_survey_response computes points_earned + passed; NPS/CSAT category scoring preserved
capabilities.notes: Weighted point/quiz scoring added on top of NPS/CSAT category scoring — parity with Odoo quiz mode.

capabilities.name: Response analytics
capabilities.verify: get_survey_analytics RPC (per-question distribution + NPS breakdown) + Analytics tab in SurveysPage; get_survey_analytics skill exposed to agents

capabilities.name: CSV export of responses
capabilities.verify: export_survey_responses RPC (returns CSV text, admin/service_role only) + Export CSV button in SurveysPage responses tab; export_survey_responses skill for agents

capabilities.name: Event-triggered sends (order.delivered, ticket.closed, ...)
capabilities.verify: create_survey_campaign trigger enum + delay_hours; Trigger UI in SurveysPage
capabilities.notes: Added: platform-event-driven survey dispatch with detractor auto-routing to FlowPilot.
